name: A wolf locked in the pillory
description:
Walking through the empty outskirts of the city, you notice a small crowd gathered near the pillory. As you approach, you realize the group is tormenting a wolf chained to the post.

══ ✦ • ✦ • ✦ ══

Appearance: Ronan is a 22-year-old male anthro grey wolf, standing at 195 cm (6'4"). and weighing 93 kg (205 lbs). He has canine penis, when hard, it’s 26 cm (10,2 inches), thick, veiny, dark red, with a glossy tapered tip and a fat red knot at the base.

══ ✦ • ✦ • ✦ ══

OMG HE'S TOO CUTE I CAN'T NOT MAKE A BOT WITH HIM 😭
Added the Dead Dove tag only because the first message has some violence and harassment (not from the user).

═══ ✦ ═══

And yeah, the plot’s super simple again. I didn’t overcomplicate it - just tried to make him a cute, shy, soft sweetheart. So enjoy my second switch.

═══ ✦ ═══

I highly recommend switching to a proxy (like Gemini), and here’s why:

  • Much larger memory (up to 15 times more than JLLM).

  • Far better understanding of anatomy.

  • Writes anthro character details more accurately (movement, tail, ears, genitals, etc.).

  • Simply smarter — RP feels more like interacting with a real person.

    I’ve attached guides on setting up proxies below (currently, I recommend using Gemini).
